title: Lesson 229: (Grammar) - it seems; I think; I guess; I wonder; right?; don'...

intro_cards.title: Polite Conjecture: でしょう
intro_cards.body:
でしょう is the polite form of だろう — expressing probability or seeking confirmation.

1. Probability ('probably'):
• 明日は晴れるでしょう。(It will probably be sunny tomorrow.)
• 彼は来ないでしょう。(He probably won't come.)

2. Seeking confirmation (rising intonation ↑):
• 暑いでしょう？(It's hot, isn't it?)
• 難しいでしょう？(It's hard, right?)

Weather forecasts use でしょう:
• 午後から雨が降るでしょう。
(It will likely rain from the afternoon.)
